GENERIC 	FOREX 	OPENING 	SCRIPT
*DISCLAIMER: The names, businesses and financial examples in these scripts are fictitious and made up for these
examples 	replace all names and company information with your own
i, is John there?
Hi, John! This is Peter Wentworth, calling from Trader’s Profit, in
Manchester. How’s it going today?
Great! Now, if you recall, you attended a seminar last Thursday night over
at the Downey Hotel, here in Manchester, with one of our top Forex-
traders, Michael Masters. Does that ring a bell?
Okay, great. Well, the reason for the call today is that you’re one of the last
of the group who hasn’t actually enrolled yet, and, if you have sixty seconds,
I’d like to share an idea with you.
You got a minute?
H
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

JORDAN BELFORT
© 1989-2015 Jordan Belfort and/or Global Motivation, Inc. All rights reserved. 	www.JordanBelfort.com
Okay, great. Just a couple of quick questions so I don’t waste your time:
1) 	Now, how long have you actually been thinking about becoming a
trader?
2) 	And are you looking to trade part-time or full-time? (If part time: about
how many hours a week?)
3) 	And what kind of work are you doing now? And how’s it going for you?
4) 	So are you looking at trading as a way to simply supplement your
current income, or is it something that you’ll transition to, full time, after
you start making tons of money with it?
5) 	Are you currently invested in the market right now? Any stocks, bonds,
mutual funds?
6) 	And just for suitability purposes, how would you say your current
financial situation is right now? On a scale of one to ten, with ten being
totally excellent—where you have as much money as you need for the rest of
your life—and, one, being stone-cold broke, with your credit cards
overextended and your landlord knocking on your door to evict you?
7) 	How much money are your thinking about to start trading with, just a
ballpark?
8) 	And are you liquid for that right now, or do you have to raise the
money? How much are you currently liquid for? Comfortably …
Okay, great! Well, let me say this: based on everything you’ve just said, the
Forex program is definitely a perfect fit for you. Now, real quick:
The actual name of the program is Max Forex Profits, and it’s by far the
most effective trading system to ever hit the marketplace. What it does is
identify nearly imperceptible trends in global currencies—like the Pound
Sterling, the Euro, and the Dollar—and then it uses a sophisticated
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

JORDAN BELFORT
© 1989-2015 Jordan Belfort and/or Global Motivation, Inc. All rights reserved. 	www.JordanBelfort.com
algorithm to guide you in and out of the market—generating massive
profits, with ridiculously low risk. Are you with me so far?
Okay—great! Now, in the past, this strategy had been used strictly by
institutional trading firms and hedge funds. Average investors, like you,
were simply boxed out of market, because the software didn’t exist for retail!
Meanwhile, companies like Big Investment House and Big Bank were using
it to make hundreds of millions a month, with virtually no downside risk!
Does that make sense?
Exactly! And on your level, by the way, the returns would still be incredible!
For example, on a mere £2,000 investment, you could average over
£__________ a month in profit—which is over a __________ monthly
return! And the numbers could go up dramatically from there! It’s truly
staggering.
Now, getting enrolled is very simple. Just a question of some basic
information, along with your card details, and I can reserve you one of those
last seats at next month’s training session. That’s it, John. And believe me: if
you do even half as well as the rest of the people who’ve gone through the
program, you’re going to be very, very impressed. Sound fair enough?
If He Agrees, Then Say:
Okay, great. Now, let me just make sure I have all your correct details. Your
full name is John Smith, correct? (Capture all necessary account info: name.
address, home number, cell number, email—then say …)

Okay—great! Now, as a far as payment goes, it’s a cash outlay of only
£1997 for the training program, and I can handle that with either a credit
card or a debit card. Which would you prefer?
Okay—great. Do you have the card handy?
If After You First Said, Fair Enough, He Asks What’s the Cost of the
Program?
It’s a cash outlay of only £1997. And, like I just said, if you do even half as
well the other people who’ve gone through this program, it’ll be the best
investment you’ve ever made. Sound fair enough?
Okay, great! Now, let me just make sure I have all your correct details. Your
full name is John Smith, correct? (Capture all necessary account info: name.
address, home number, cell number, email—then say …)
Okay—great! Now, as a far as payment for goes, I can handle that with
either a credit card or a debit card. Which would you prefer?
